body: " In addition to the professional and production staff at Ofqual, pre-release access to the statistics of up to 24 hours is granted to the following post holders.  Ofqual   Associate Director Data Analytics and Research Associate Director of Media and Campaigns Associate Director of Media and Campaigns Associate Director of Media and Campaigns Associate Director, Strategic Relationships Chief Regulator Deputy Chief Regulator Director of Communications Executive Director Research and Analysis Executive Director for General Qualifications Executive Director for Standards, Research and Analysis Executive Director for Vocational and Technical Qualifications Senior Manager, Policy and Strategic Relationships for GQ Senior Manager, Strategic Relationships   AQA   External Communications Senior Manager Head of Regulation   Department for Education   Analyst Analyst Deputy Director Technical Education and Qualifications Technical Qualifications & Essential Skills Deputy Director – Qualifications Systems Directors of Curriculum and General Qualifications Media Office Media Office Media Officer Minister for Schools Permanent Secretary Policy Lead Policy Lead Policy Lead Policy Lead Private Secretary for Minister for Schools Private Secretary to the Permanent Secretary   Pearson   Director for Corporate Communications   WJEC   PR & Brand Manager  "
